mainEntity.name: What is the minimum capital for LLP?

acceptedAnswer.text: No minimum capital. Partners contribute as specified in the LLP Agreement. Even ₹1,000 is acceptable.
Only if turnover exceeds ₹40 lakhs OR partner contribution exceeds ₹25 lakhs. Below both thresholds: only Form 8 and Form 11 annual filing required.
LLPs cannot issue equity shares. They can raise debt (loans) but not equity from VCs/angels. If you need equity funding, convert to Pvt Ltd.

mainEntity.name: Can LLP be converted to Pvt Ltd?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, under Section 366 of Companies Act. Process takes 30-45 days. We handle the complete conversion.

mainEntity.name: How many partners can an LLP have?

acceptedAnswer.text: Minimum 2 (designated partners). No maximum limit. At least 2 designated partners must be individuals, with at least 1 being an Indian resident.
